subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.4
question_html:
Which equation represents the deposition of iodine?

A.  I2 (g) → I2 (l)

B.  I2 (g) → I2 (s)

C.  I2 (l) → I2 (g)

D.  I2 (s) → I2 (g)
examiners_html: 58% of the candidates identified the equation that represented the deposition of iodine. The most commonly chosen distractor was the condensation of gaseous iodine. Sublimation was also quite commonly chosen.
